release_notes: Media Experiment Ledger Studio 1.0.0-rc.2 qualifies the complete desktop package lifecycle instead of stopping at build and launch smoke. Every supported package is exercised from a generated 0.9.9 baseline through an in-place RC.2 upgrade, followed by removal and explicit verification that user data remains intact. This release also links the immutable Quick Start sample corpus v2.
features: Windows x64 silent NSIS baseline install and in-place RC.2 upgrade
Windows x64 portable package launch qualification
Linux x64 deb install, upgrade and removal lifecycle
Linux x64 AppImage independent launch qualification
macOS arm64 DMG installation, bundle replacement and removal lifecycle
macOS Intel x64 DMG installation, bundle replacement and removal lifecycle
Persistent user-data sentinel verification across upgrade and uninstall on every platform
Complete packaged renderer, preload, SQLite and self-contained engine smoke after installation
Immutable Quick Start sample corpus v2 integration
Four-platform packages with SBOM, checksums, notices, source SHA and consolidated release evidence
